CustomField.formula: IF( App_Asgn_Total_Count__c = 0, "New", IF( App_Asgn_New_Count__c = App_Asgn_Total_Count__c, "New", IF( App_Asgn_Pending_Count__c = App_Asgn_Total_Count__c , "Pending", IF( App_Asgn_Approve_with_Changes_Count__c = App_Asgn_Total_Count__c ,"Pending", IF( App_Asgn_Approved_Count__c = App_Asgn_Total_Count__c, "Ready for Signature", IF( App_Asgn_Rejected_Count__c = App_Asgn_Total_Count__c, "Rejected", "Draft"))))))
CustomField.label: Internal Approval Status
